CustomField.description: Populated via the Workato integration, this field retrieves the Total ARR by ZoomInfo Ultimate Parent Customer (UPC) value from Snowflake. Reference GTMS-4926
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field represents the total ARR value based on ZoomInfo’s account hierarchy. In most cases, this aligns with the Salesforce account hierarchy, though exceptions may occur.
CustomField.label: Total Hierarchy ARR
